economic_notes: 33.333% interest in Shwe Miikaan Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method. Partnership had revenue of $1,995,458 and net income of $1,036,163 for year ended December 31, 2022.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED on three bases: (1) inability to observe/verify inventories for cost of sales for 2023 and 2022; (2) management has not completed assessment of tangible capital assets for PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations (adopted April 1, 2022) — impact cannot be quantified; (3) unable to confirm completeness and existence of Cannabis sales and expenses in First Nation Administration segment. Sales of gas and supplies ($19.46M) drove total revenue significantly higher than prior year ($7.14M). Deferred revenue increased dramatically to $10.78M primarily due to Water Systems funding of $9.12M from Indigenous Services Canada. Audit report dated November 28, 2024 — well over a year after fiscal year end.
